scripts.dev:agent: npm --workspace @winbridge/protocol run build && npm --workspace @winbridge/audit-log run build && npm --workspace @winbridge/windows-capture run build && npm --workspace @winbridge/windows-input run build && npm --workspace @winbridge/agent-shell run dev --
scripts.dev:relay: npm --workspace @winbridge/protocol run build && npm --workspace @winbridge/audit-log run build && npm --workspace @winbridge/relay run dev
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run openspec:validate
